---
title: "Guorui Zhong"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: /files/profiles/bottts-1774764655644.png
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: journal-check
      aria-label: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=g0MfTPMAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: github
      aria-label: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/grgrzhong
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/guorui-zhong-754761185/
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-tools:
      source: false
---

Cell biologist with applied skills in bioinformatics and computational biology.

## Skills

- **Wet lab**: Genome editing with CRISPR/Cas9, cell model development
- **Multi-omics**: WGS, WES, RNA-seq, scRNA-seq, methylation arrays, proteomics
- **Spatial transcriptomics**: Visium, Visium HD, 10x Genomics platforms
- **Imaging**: High-throughput phenotypic profiling with machine learning
- **Programming**: R (tidyverse, Bioconductor, ggplot2), Python

## Research Interests

- Genome engineering to dissect gene function in cancer and immune cells
- Single-cell and spatial omics to study cellular heterogeneity
- High-throughput imaging and computational analysis of cell behaviour
- Multi-omics integration to uncover disease mechanisms
